scripts.verify:phase1: npm run verify:no-fake-modes && npm run e2e:root-surfaces-smoke
scripts.verify:phase01: node scripts/verify/prod-runtime-posture.mjs && node scripts/verify/check-no-fake-modes.mjs && npm run build && node scripts/verify/staging-env-check.mjs --allow-template deploy/production/env/control-os.production.env.example
